positive: A highly stylized, geometric illustration of a majestic grizzly bear standing confidently in a dense forest clearing. The bear is rendered in a clean, solid silhouette style, filled with vibrant abstract biomorphic patterns in deep emerald green, burnt orange, and sapphire blue. The composition must be centered and highly adaptable for apparel printing. Minimalist background negative space around the subject to enhance contrast. Flat vector graphic aesthetic, highly contrasting colors, designed for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, depth of field, blur, noisy, gradients, artifacts, text, logo, signature, watermark, low contrast, bad anatomy, ugly, extra limbs, messy lines
